flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 35% at Clinton Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (388 vs 593).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Clinton Community College rose 20% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.0k → $13.2k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Clinton Community College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (21.4% vs 27.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clinton Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
